name: coding-collaboration-journal
job_to_be_done: Create and operate an evidence-grounded, Git-backed, long-term record of a developer's collaboration with Codex and Claude Code.
triggers: automatic daily Codex or Claude Code summary
personal growth analysis from coding-agent sessions
install or repair a scheduled engineering reflection workflow
exclusions: one-off summaries with no durable system requested
employee surveillance or comparative worker scoring
failure_modes: collection failure mislabeled as no activity
scheduler assumed to work without smoke test
model upgrades mistaken for user improvement

risk.durable_write_policy: memory updates configurable; workflow changes evidence-backed
